title: Kaidens Fabric Choices
description: A series of mods that I personally enjoy.
body:
# Kaidens Fabric Choices
Just a little modpack I made when I was bored. 

---
## Notable Mods
- **Cadmus**
  - Adds Chunk Claiming
- **Create**
  - Adds the ability to make mechanical contraptions, aka make factories.
- **CC:Tweaked**
  - Adds neat little programmable computers in the Lua coding language.
- **Farmers Delight**
  - A neat mod for foodies like me who like cooking. Adds new food recipes and pots + pans.
- **All of Yung’s structure mods**
  - Upgraded End Island, Witch Huts, Strongholds, and other structures!
  - Also adds naturally generated bridges every now and again.
- **Ad Astra**
  - Adds the technological advancement of space exploration.
- **Better Nether & End**
  - Add's more biomes and ores to both the Nether and End
- **Better Combat**
  - Animated Swinging and finally the ability to swing through grass/tallgrass.
- **Gravestones**
  - Puts all your belongings in a grave when you die! :D
- **Inmis + Inmis Addon**
  - Backpacks :3
- **Tempad**
  - Adds the ability to teleports from one location to another using the Tempad from Disneys Loki!
- **Epic Knights**
  - Adds Knight Armor and Weapons.
---

### !WARNING!
The modpack may or may not work at the time of downloading. Currently Create Fabric ***DOES NOT*** support Sodium >0.5. If you do wish to use Create Fabric before they update it I recommend using [Treetrain1's Create Fabric Sodium Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric-sodium-fix). Also note that this ***IS NOT*** an add-on to Create it is a ***TEMPORARY REPLACEMENT*** until the mod is updated.

[Projects]: https://modrinth.com/user/KaidenArt
